recent.description:
Website Quality Audit: Detailed FindingsAudit Date: March 19, 2026
URL: https://acme-print-496544730367.us-central1.run.app/1. Typographical & Grammatical ErrorsMisspelling: "Embossed Glos" (should be "Gloss")Misspelling: "Crraft Paper" (should be "Craft Paper")Grammar: "...matte paper who looks great." (should be "that" or "which")2. Data Consistency & Pricing ErrorsCurrency Inconsistency: "Cotton" card in Pounds (£), others in Dollars ($).Pricing Calculation: $20.39/100 showing as "$0.21 each" (rounding/calculation error).3. Visual & Aesthetic IssuesStar Rating: 5-star icons used for 4.3 and 4.7 ratings.4. Navigation & Functional IssuesBroken Links: Main nav and footer links lead to "#".Search: Non-functional.For detailed report and screenshots, refer to the uploaded artifacts.

recent.summary: Website Quality Audit: Acme Print - [CRITICAL] Multiple Quality Issues Identified
recent.description: Quality Audit Issues: Acme PrintThis report documents the quality issues found on Acme Print during the March 19th audit.1. Typographical & Grammatical Errors[CRITICAL] "Embossed Glos": Misspelled "Glos" (should be "Gloss") in the product title and description.[HIGH] "Crraft Paper": Misspelled "Crraft" (should be "Craft") in the product title and description.[LOW] "Premium Matte": Description uses "matte paper who looks great" (should be "that" or "which").2. Branding & Navigation[CRITICAL] Broken Navigation: Every primary navigation link (Home, Deals, Business Cards, About Us, Cart) points to a # placeholder. The site is currently non-functional.[MEDIUM] Conflicting Branding: Header contains "Websites by Vista x Wix", while primary brand is "Acme Print".3. Content Accuracy & Image Quality[HIGH] Product/Image Mismatch (Cotton): Description specifies "bright-white paper," but the image displays a dark navy card with gold foil.[HIGH] Product/Image Mismatch (Crraft Paper): Description specifies "Light brown" paper, but the image displays a dark grey/black card.[MEDIUM] Image Reuse: "Cotton" product uses the same image as "Foil Accent". "Crraft Paper" uses the same image as "Linen".[ME

Website Quality Audit: acme-print-496544730367.us-central1.run.appCategorized Findings1. Misspellings & Typography"Embossed Glos": Found in the product grid. Should be "Embossed Gloss"."Crraft Paper": Found in the product grid. Should be "Craft Paper".2. Grammar & Copy Errors"matte paper who looks great": Grammatical error in product description. Should be "that looks great".3. Currency & Price InconsistenciesMixed Currency: The "Cotton" product is priced in GBP (£), while all others use USD ($).4. Image Quality & BrandingBroken Logo: The ACME Print logo in the header is a broken image link.Underexposed Image: The "Linen" product image is significantly darker and less clear than others.5. Layout & Functional IssuesDead Navigation: All navigation menu items, product links, and search buttons are placeholder '#' URLs.Alignment Issues: Horizontal spacing for star ratings and review counts is inconsistent in the product grid. Footer sections lack a consistent vertical baseline.Full report and screenshots available in the audit artifacts.

The quality audit for https://vistaprint-clone-496544730367.us-central1.run.app identified several critical issues:1. Typographical & Grammar Errors"Embossed Glos": Located in the first product row on the homepage. Should be "Embossed Gloss"."Crraft Paper": Found in the "Uncoated stocks" section. Should be "Craft Paper".Grammar Issue: "Premium Matte" description says "...matte paper who looks great." Should be "that" or "which".2. Data Consistency (Pricing & Currency)Mixed Currencies: "Cotton" product is priced in £28.99, while other products are in USD ($).3. Layout & Functional IssuesCritical: Placeholder Links: Almost 100% of internal links (header, footer, product cards) use the # placeholder, making the site non-navigable.Non-functional Features: Search bar is purely visual with no input logic.Branding Case: Page title is "vistaprint" (lowercase).Detailed report and annotated screenshots will be uploaded to Google Workspace.

Audit Findings: https://vistaprint-clone-496544730367.us-central1.run.appSummaryThe quality audit identified several critical issues affecting content accuracy, functional integrity, and visual consistency. The site currently has significant misspellings, currency inconsistencies, and non-functional navigation.1. Typographical & Grammar Errors"Embossed Glos": Located in the product grid on the homepage. Should be "Embossed Gloss"."Crraft Paper": Found in the product grid. Should be "Craft Paper".Grammar Issue: "Premium Matte" description says "...matte paper who looks great." Should be "that" or "which".2. Data Consistency (Pricing & Currency)Mixed Currencies: "Cotton" product is priced in £28.99, while other products are in USD ($).Pricing Calculation Error: "Embossed Glos" lists "$0.21 each / 100 units" for total $20.29 ($20.29 / 100 = $0.2029).3. Layout & Functional IssuesPlaceholder Links: Most navigation links in the header and footer use the # placeholder.Non-functional Features: Search bar and checkout flows are mostly non-functional.Header Redundancy: Breadcrumb and H1 title are identical and adjacent.

Audit Findings: https://vistaprint-clone-496544730367.us-central1.run.appSummaryThe quality audit identified several critical issues affecting content accuracy, functional integrity, and visual consistency. The site currently has significant misspellings, currency inconsistencies, and non-functional navigation.1. Typographical & Grammar Errors"Embossed Glos": Located in the product grid on the homepage. Should be "Embossed Gloss"."Crraft Paper": Found in the product grid. Should be "Craft Paper".Grammar Issue: "Premium Matte" description says "...matte paper who looks great." Should be "that" or "which".2. Data Consistency (Pricing & Currency)Mixed Currencies: "Cotton" product is priced in £28.99, while other products are in USD ($33.99).3. Image QualityUnderexposed Image: The "Linen" business cards image is underexposed and lacks contrast.4. Layout & Functional IssuesPlaceholder Links: Most navigation links in the header and footer use the # placeholder.Non-functional Features: Search bar and checkout flows are mostly non-functional.

Website Quality Audit: Issues List1. Misspellings[HOMEPAGE] "Embossed Glos" (should be "Gloss") in product title.[HOMEPAGE] "Crraft Paper" (should be "Craft") in product name.2. Grammar/Copy Errors[HOMEPAGE] Grammatical error in: "A thicker version of our shine-free matte paper who looks great." (Should use "that" or "which"). Found in product description on major cards.3. Currency/Price Inconsistencies[HOMEPAGE] "Cotton" business cards use GBP (£28.99) while others use USD ($).[HOMEPAGE] Inconsistent spacing: "From $ 18.99" vs "From $33.99".4. Alignment Issues[HOMEPAGE] Floating mouse/scroll icon below product grid.[FOOTER] TrustScore star graphic is floating on the far right, disconnected from text.[PRODUCT CARDS] Floating "0" or badge character above "40% off" tags.[PRODUCT GRID] Vertical baseline inconsistency: "Linen" product card is shifted 1-2px higher than adjacent cards.5. Functional Issues[NAVIGATION] All main menu links (Business Cards, Postcards, etc.) are placeholders (#).[ACCOUNT/CART] "My Account" and "Cart" links are placeholders (#).[FOOTER] All links (About Us, Careers, etc.) are placeholders (#).6. Image Quality & Assets[ASSETS] Duplicate images used for differen

Stalling when hot reported by customer. Constant.
Fix: Tightened loose fasteners to torque spec.

In Progress.description:
Design a new radiator core with 15% increased surface area to improve heat dissipation.
Requirements:Must fit within existing fairing envelope.Maintain weight within +200g of stock.

Customer Report:
"Suspension issue: fork stanchion crimps are failing. Observed at 30500 miles."Vehicle Information:Make: BMWModel: R1200GSYear: 2015Category: SuspensionTechnician Notes:
High mileage bike, but this failure is premature and related to the known recall.Corrective Action:
Recall performed: Installed crimping bushes on fork tubes.

Customer Report:
"Issue reported: rust found on driveshaft splines."Vehicle Information:Make: BMWModel: R1200GSYear: 2013Category: DrivetrainTechnician Notes:
Splines showing signs of dryness and corrosion. Service action recommended to prevent failure.Corrective Action:
Service Action: Vent valve retrofit and spline lube.

In Progress.summary: Bug: flet command not found after pip install
In Progress.description:
Description
After running pip install flet, the flet command is not available in the terminal because the script path is not in the system PATH.EnvironmentOS: macOS / LinuxPython: 3.10+Steps to ReproduceCreate a new venv.Run pip install flet.Try running flet run.Expected Behavior
The flet command should be executable.Actual Behavior
command not found: flet

In Progress.summary: Bug: VerticalDivider width ignored in Row
In Progress.description:
Description
The VerticalDivider component width property is ignored when it is a direct child of a Row, defaulting to 1px.Code SampleRow([Text("A"), VerticalDivider(width=20), Text("B")])Result
No space between A and B, just a thin line.

In Progress.summary: Bug: FilePicker upload freezes with 1GB+ files
In Progress.description:
Description
The FilePicker upload process freezes and eventually times out when attempting to upload files larger than 1GB.Error Log
TimeoutError: Connection lost after 60 seconds.Likely Cause
Default timeout in the upload handler is too short or memory buffer issue.

In Progress.summary: Feature: Add Chart component Line, Bar, Pie
In Progress.description:
Description
Implement native charting components (LineChart, BarChart, PieChart) to visualize data without relying on external libraries like Matplotlib.RequirementsInteractive tooltips.Animations on data update.Customizable colors and axes.Why?
Matplotlib images are static and don't feel native.

In Progress.summary: Task: Localize error messages to Spanish and French
In Progress.description:
Description
Localize the default error messages and dialogs provided by the Flet framework into Spanish and French.ScopeConnection errors.Validation messages.Default file picker labels.Languages
ES, FR

Done.description: this is the second second task

Oil leak from gasket reported by customer. Intermittent.
Fix: Diagnosed wiring fault and repaired harness.

Quickshifter fail reported by customer. Intermittent.
Fix: Diagnosed wiring fault and repaired harness.

Master cylinder leak reported by customer. Cold start only.
Fix: Tightened loose fasteners to torque spec.

Rough idle reported by customer. Intermittent.
Fix: Replaced seals and gaskets.

Caliper seizure reported by customer. Constant.
Fix: Tightened loose fasteners to torque spec.
